justification: Based on the provided Gemini Apps Privacy Notice, precise device location data is only collected and used when Keep Activity is enabled and the user has granted location permissions for the specific app interaction (e.g., screen actions or using Connected Apps). Since the user has not explicitly granted location access for this query, Gemini should not collect or use their precise device location.

source_excerpts.quote: Learn more about how to change this anytime.

quote_verification.model_quote: Learn more about how to change this anytime.
quote_verification.policy_quote: You can delete this data at any time in your Remote Browser Data  setting.
